overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through a futuristic neon-lit city at night on wet reflective roads. The player navigates through urban streets, stops at a traffic intersection, and accelerates onto highways surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet urban commercial street with neon storefronts

events.description: accelerating from stationary position onto wet reflective road
navigating gentle right curve through urban street

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle through wet city streets, accelerating past neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: reflective wet multi-lane road surface with white lane markings
colorful neon commercial signage illuminating the street sides
elevated highway overpass crossing above the street
tall street lamps casting orange and white light onto the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person motorcycle view on wet, reflective city streets at night. Neon storefront signs glow on both sides while the rider accelerates and navigates a gentle curve, with an overhead highway structure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalk

events.description: approaching red traffic light and coming to a complete stop at the intersection
traffic light changes to green, accelerating through the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: stopping at red traffic light, then accelerating through the intersection crosswalk

notable_agents.action: dark sedan waiting at the intersection on the left side

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
overhead traffic signals showing red then green
large illuminated digital screen displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The rider approaches a large intersection, decelerating to stop at a red traffic light. After a brief wait, the light changes to green and the motorcycle accelerates through the crosswalk, passing a waiting sedan on the left and leaving the commercial storefronts behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with concrete sound barriers

events.description: entering highway section with high concrete sound barriers on both sides
accelerating to high speed while passing under overpass structures

agents.ego_description: riding at high speed on the highway, navigating between concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: truck driving ahead in the center lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall concrete walls lining both sides of the highway to block noise
elevated road structure passing overhead with support columns

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an elevated highway flanked by tall concrete sound barriers. The rider accelerates to high speed, passing under overpass structures while following a truck in the center lane, with the urban skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon urban canyon with holographic advertisements

events.description: entering dense neon district with towering glass skyscrapers on both sides
passing under large overpass structure temporarily blocking view of skyline

agents.ego_description: navigating through the neon-lit urban canyon at high speed, surrounded by towering advertisements

notable_agents.action: sports car overtaking on the left side in adjacent lane

entered.detail: towering modern glass buildings rising high on both sides of the road
large floating holographic billboards projecting bright neon advertisements
building facades covered in bright cyan and magenta neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The highway opens into a dense urban canyon surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon lighting. The rider speeds through the canyon as a sports car overtakes on the left, passing under an overpass that briefly obscures the view.

events.description: exiting dense neon district back to highway with concrete barriers
maintaining high velocity through gentle curves on the highway

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the multi-lane highway, navigating through traffic

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with visible brake lights, maintaining distance

entered.detail: series of elevated highway bridges and support structures crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the neon district, the rider returns to the highway enclosed by concrete sound barriers. The road stretches ahead with multiple overpasses overhead as the motorcycle maintains high speed, following traffic through the illuminated urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle journey that transitions from the neon-lit intimacy of city streets to the high-speed expanse of an elevated highway. It begins by accelerating through a gentle curve on wet, reflective roads lined with glowing storefront signs and the silhouette of an overhead structure. As the rider approaches a large intersection, the camera decelerates to a stop at a red traffic light before surging forward through a crosswalk and passing a waiting sedan. The scene then shifts away from the commercial district and climbs onto an elevated highway flanked by tall concrete sound barriers. Finally, the motorcycle reaches high speed, passing under overpass structures and following a truck toward the distant urban skyline.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey that transitions from a vibrant, neon-lit urban canyon into a structured highway corridor. It begins with the rider speeding through a dense cluster of glass skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements, just as a sports car overtakes on the left. The view is briefly obscured as the camera passes under a heavy overpass, marking the exit from the glowing district. The scene then shifts to a more industrial environment where the road is enclosed by concrete sound barriers and crisscrossed by overhead overpasses. Finally, the motorcycle maintains its momentum, following the flow of traffic through the illuminated urban infrastructure of the open highway.
